overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a walk through a neon-lit covered transit corridor transitioning into a food court. The environment features vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting, futuristic industrial architecture, metal walkways, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit walkway with cyan neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips

entered.detail: dark metal ceiling with exposed beams covering the walkway
continuous cyan neon tubes running along the ceiling and walls
large red industrial structure or vehicle visible through the left side
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the ceiling structure
transparent glass barrier with metal frame along the right side
tall building facade illuminated with pink and magenta neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk transit corridor with cyan neon lighting. The path is flanked by concrete pillars on the left and a glass railing on the right overlooking a neon-lit building. The ceiling is low with exposed beams, and the floor is made of metal grating.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between corridor and food court

events.description: lighting transitions from cool cyan neon to warmer interior tones as the food court approaches
entering the food court area with service counters and digital menus becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the corridor toward the illuminated food service area

notable_agents.action: standing near the food counter in the distance

entered.detail: illuminated service counter with digital menu displays
glowing screens displaying food options above the counter
blue plastic chairs arranged around tables

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a food court area with warm lighting replacing the cool neon. Digital menu boards and service counters become visible ahead. The glass railing and exterior neon building exit the frame as the scene transitions to an interior space with dining furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: food court with service counters and digital ordering

events.description: arriving at the food service counter where NPCs are standing and ordering

agents.ego_description: entering the food court and approaching the service counter with NPCs

notable_agents.action: customer standing at the counter waiting to order
vendor working behind the service counter

entered.detail: bright rectangular fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling
large illuminated advertisement or artwork on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Now inside the food court, the camera approaches the service counter where NPCs are gathered. The lighting is warm and artificial with fluorescent ceiling lights. Digital menu screens glow above the counter, and the space feels like an enclosed commercial interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cool, neon-lit transit corridor into the warm, artificial glow of a commercial food court. It begins by traversing a covered walkway with metal grating floors and cyan neon lighting, flanked by concrete pillars and a glass railing overlooking a futuristic building. As the camera moves forward, the corridor opens and the cool exterior tones shift into warm interior lighting, causing the glass railing and neon cityscape to exit the frame. The scene then expands into a dining area filled with furniture and digital menu boards before finally approaching a service counter where NPCs gather under bright fluorescent ceiling lights.
